typical_trigger: family not in known family rule table
recommended_action: Create candidate-specific or family-specific new rule after manual review

meaning: Family exists but required motif/residue/ligand evidence is absent
typical_trigger: known residue not mapped; ligand class missing; no pocket residue overlap
recommended_action: Keep as REVIEW; inspect raw residue/pocket mapping

meaning: Rule exists but primary/reference context differs from calibration
typical_trigger: PDB primary became AFSP primary; chain-specific reference unavailable; cache missing
recommended_action: Apply rule only if evidence compatibility is confirmed

meaning: Primary reference has no ligand/cofactor context
typical_trigger: n_ligand_groups=0 or no biological ligand in primary PDB
recommended_action: Do not penalize automatically; check known residues and supporting holo context

meaning: Supporting PDB contains plausible biological ligand/cofactor context
typical_trigger: supporting PDB ligand/cofactor present near pocket
recommended_action: Record as supporting evidence; do not override primary

meaning: Observed ligand/cofactor pattern not represented in rulebook
typical_trigger: new ligand family, substrate analog, cofactor, metal cluster

meaning: Metal/cofactor context appears but biological class is unresolved
recommended_action: Separate biological metal/cofactor from crystallization artifact

typical_trigger: partial qcov/tcov; domain-specific alignment; viral remodeling

recommended_action: Use structural/pocket evidence but ligand-contact unavailable

meaning: Supporting PDB selected by Foldseek but local structure not available
recommended_action: Keep Foldseek context; mark unresolved; optionally download/fetch later

meaning: Signals too weak or inconsistent to open new rule
typical_trigger: weak primary, weak supporting, missing pocket, no motif
